type.fr: Dispositifs de réduction des émissions de dioxyde soufre - renseignements supplémentaires

comments.comment:
Power boilers burn waste wood which is a low sulfur fuel.
Chemical recovery boilers are intentionally high in sulfur, but are operated to capture and retain as much sulfur in the smelt as possible.

comments.comment:
The major point source in previous years was the CNCG incinerator.  A new ì
demister was installed in mid 1996, and was on-line for all of 1997.  This ì
demister removes >90% of the sulphuric acid aerosol previously releasedì
from this point source.
